description: This file contains a script for verifying the existence of required database tables in a project, supporting both MySQL and PostgreSQL, and ensuring environment variables are loaded correctly.

methods.name: _formatList
methods.description: Formats an array of strings into a comma-separated list of quoted strings.

methods.name: _getExistingTablesMysql
methods.description: Fetches existing table names from MySQL database matching the required list.

methods.name: _getExistingTablesPostgres
methods.description: Fetches existing table names from PostgreSQL database matching the required list.

methods.name: verifyRequiredTables
methods.description: Main function that verifies all required tables exist in the configured database.
